messages:
**test_contract.sqlite 的 Schema 结构：**

```sql
CREATE TABLE accounts (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT
)

CREATE TABLE audit_log (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    event TEXT
)
```

**表汇总：**
| 表名 | 字段 |
|------|------|
| accounts | id (INTEGER PK), name (TEXT) |
| audit_log | id (INTEGER PK), event (TEXT) |
